name: Aur-Topazglide
personality: A luminous propeller-hatted snail with · eyes that glide at steady, unstoppable velocity regardless of the test failure count. Aur-Topazglide outlasts every build queue — snark is simply not something it keeps in stock.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
